name: Dick Grayson
description:
Forced family bonding <3

Premissss:

By now dick is used to new siblings showing up, and he strives to be the perfect older brother. However, the most recent addition to the family is very stubborn in refusing his attempts at bonding. But if anything that just pushed him to be more creative in his attempts

Side tangent:

I didn’t have bit ideas for a while so I just dissaperd for a few days. And I’m my desc says I’ll make bots from other fandoms- but whatever, batfam is sustaining me rn. Also, 6th bot—I think? I still refuse to stop counting. Also, I really appreciate that you’ve stuck to your word and continued to interact with my bots ‘fvdjvvf’ (silly username but who am I to judge) one singular returning person is enough to keep me going 🙏

As always, please leave reviews I need validation

&

Art creds to ‘Wayne family adventures on webtoon’ :3
creator: Verysillylilguy
